proposals.title: Technical and Financial Proposal
proposals.description: Technical and financial proposal to provide technical support for 3 e-commerce stores set up on Salla platform.

introduction.title: Introduction
content: I am pleased to present this technical and financial proposal to provide technical support for 3 e-commerce stores that have been set up on the Salla platform.
This proposal includes comprehensive details about the technical work and services that will be provided to the stores.
We are committed to providing innovative technical solutions that align with global best practices and meet your requirements with precision and high professionalism.

items.description: Implementing designs that align with the visual identity and employing them correctly within the stores
Implementing improvements in store interfaces to ensure ease of use and clarity of elements for customers
Providing technical support to address urgent technical issues and communicate with Salla support when needed
Reviewing products and ensuring their content effectiveness and appearance in search engines
Providing technical recommendations to help improve store performance and increase operational efficiency
Issuing a monthly performance report including store status, completed work, and technical notes

itemsOverview.title: Design and Brand Identity Implementation
details: Implementing designs compatible with the approved visual identity.
Employing identity elements within store pages professionally and consistently.
Adjusting colors and fonts to reflect the brand identity.
Addressing any design conflicts to ensure a consistent experience.

itemsOverview.title: User Experience Enhancement
details: Improving the clarity of elements within store pages to facilitate content access.
Rearranging elements when needed to improve ease of use.
Improving navigation between pages, sections, and products.
Addressing issues related to user experience smoothness.
Ensuring interface compatibility with different devices.

itemsOverview.title: Quick Technical Support
details: Providing quick technical support to resolve technical failures within stores.
Handling issues related to settings, integrations, or files.
Communicating with Salla platform support to resolve platform-related issues.
Following up on issues until resolved and documenting procedures.

itemsOverview.title: Product Review
details: Reviewing product pages to ensure content quality and accuracy.
Verifying availability of all necessary information for customers.
Ensuring product compliance with basic SEO standards.
Reviewing categories and tags and ensuring products are linked correctly.

itemsOverview.title: Store Performance Improvement Suggestions
details: Studying the store's technical status and identifying improvement points.
Providing recommendations to increase browsing speed and store stability.
Suggesting technical modifications that contribute to increasing operational efficiency.
Providing advice regarding settings and content organization.
Suggestions based on operational experience within the Salla platform.

itemsOverview.title: Monthly Reports
details: Issuing a comprehensive monthly report on completed work.
Presenting technical cases that have been handled.
Providing technical recommendations to improve overall performance.
Documenting issues and solutions that have been implemented.

notes.text: A 7% commission is calculated based on the monthly sales, and the due amounts are settled quarterly.
subNotes: The commission is calculated based on the net actual sales after deducting returned orders.
The developer issues an official financial invoice for the due amounts at the end of each quarterly period.

notes.text: Main platform contents cannot be modified if they violate Salla platform policies
subNotes: No work that conflicts with the main platform policies will be executed.
Modifications that exceed permissions or require editing internal codes are rejected.

notes.text: Technical support does not include paying any costs related to service providers or add-ons
subNotes: Such as payment gateways.
SMS systems.
App store add-ons.
Third-party services.

notes.text: Technical support services are provided by a developer holding a freelance license
notes.subNote: All work is executed according to official technical activity regulations

notes.text: Technical support does not include content management, product addition, or image design
subNotes: Adding or uploading products.
Designing or editing images.
Writing or drafting text content.
Providing necessary permissions and data to perform tasks.
Providing the developer with content, visual identity, and required materials.
Complying with Salla platform limits and permitted permissions within the system.
Providing Salla Pro package when needed for advanced customizations.
Responding to inquiries and approvals within a reasonable time.
Reviewing work within the specified period and providing feedback.
Commitment to content accuracy and commercial regulations.
Executing work within the limits allowed by the Salla platform.
Delivering work with required quality and according to the agreed schedule.
Maintaining confidentiality of store data.
Providing technical support to address apparent errors.
Not responsible for failures resulting from Salla updates or payment and shipping issues.
Adopting clear communication channels such as WhatsApp or email.
Documenting any additional request and approving it before execution.
Delivering work through the platform or via detailed report.

notes.text: Technical support services will commence after the proposal is approved and the service agreement provided by the developer is signed.
notes.subNote: No tasks will be carried out before completing the signing process.

proposals.title: Technical and Financial Proposal - Website Development
proposals.description: A comprehensive technical and financial proposal for developing a professional website that meets your digital business needs

introduction.title: Introduction
content: I am pleased to present this technical and financial proposal for developing a professional website that reflects your company's identity and achieves your digital goals.
This proposal includes comprehensive details about technical phases, design, development, and technical support, in addition to competitive prices and implementation timelines.
We are committed to providing innovative technical solutions that align with global best practices and meet your requirements with precision and high professionalism.

items.description: Website development using Vue.js and HTML/CSS
Developing a comprehensive dashboard for content management
Optimizing the website for search engines and adding meta tags
Free technical support for 3 months after launch

itemsOverview.title: Design and Interfaces
details: Studying brand identity and analyzing competitors
Designing website pages professionally and responsive to all devices
Designing a smooth and easy-to-use user experience (UX)
Delivering prototypes (Mockups) and final designs in multiple formats
Conducting reviews and modifications based on your feedback (up to 3 review rounds)

itemsOverview.title: Frontend Development
details: Developing the website using Vue.js 3 and the latest web technologies
Building interactive and fast-responsive interfaces
Full compatibility with all browsers and mobile devices
Applying modern web standards (HTML5, CSS3, ES6+)
Performance optimization and loading speed improvement
Support for both Arabic and English with smooth switching

itemsOverview.title: Backend Development
details: Building a secure and scalable API using Node.js and Express
Designing a professional database (MongoDB or MySQL as needed)
Implementing security and protection standards (Authentication & Authorization)
Creating a user and permissions management system
Developing email services and notifications
Comprehensive documentation for all API endpoints

itemsOverview.title: Admin Dashboard
details: Developing an easy-to-use dashboard for website content management
Adding, editing, and deleting pages and sections easily
User and permissions management
Uploading images and files with direct preview
Comprehensive statistics and reports on website performance
Arabic/English interface based on admin's choice

itemsOverview.title: SEO Optimization
details: Optimizing website structure for search engines (Google, Bing)
Adding meta tags and open graph tags for all pages
Creating XML sitemap
Adding appropriate robots.txt file
Improving loading speed and website performance
Applying technical SEO best practices
Supporting schema.org for structured data

itemsOverview.title: Hosting and Domain
details: Professional cloud hosting with 99.9% uptime guarantee
Free domain for one year (.com, .sa, or others)
Free SSL certificate to secure the website
Daily automatic backups
24/7 technical support from hosting provider

itemsOverview.title: Technical Support
details: Free technical support for 3 months after website launch
Quick fixing of errors and technical issues
Assistance in using the control panel
Regular security updates
Technical consultations via email or phone
Possibility to extend technical support at competitive prices

notes.text: All mentioned prices are in Saudi Riyals and do not include VAT
notes.subNote: 15% VAT will be added to the final invoice as per Saudi tax regulations

notes.text: The implementation period is estimated at 6-8 weeks from the project start date
subNotes: Week 1-2: Design and wireframes
Week 3-5: Frontend and backend development
Week 6-7: Testing and quality assurance
Week 8: Deployment and training

notes.text: Final delivery includes full source code and comprehensive documentation
subNotes: Complete source code with comments
Technical architecture documentation
API documentation with examples
User manual and admin guide
Deployment and maintenance guide

notes.text: A 50% down payment is required before starting work, and the remaining 50% upon delivery
notes.subNote: Payment can be made via bank transfer or other agreed-upon methods

notes.text: This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issue
notes.subNote: After the validity period, prices and terms are subject to review and adjustment
